functions.name: log_audit_action
functions.docstring:
Logs an action to the immutable audit stream.
Requires before/after state to prove transitions.

functions.name: get_context_dict
functions.docstring: Extracts all observability context into a dictionary for logging.

functions.name: set_request_context
functions.docstring: Sets request-level context variables. Returns tokens for resetting.

functions.name: set_graph_context
functions.docstring:
Sets graph-level context variables. Returns tokens for resetting.
Call this from graph_builder before ainvoke and reset after.

functions.name: set_node_context
functions.docstring: Sets the current node ID. Call from @trace_node decorator.

functions.name: reset_context
functions.docstring: Resets context variables using their reset tokens (proper async-safe reset).

functions.name: clear_context
functions.docstring: Clears context for the current thread/task using set('') — use reset_context for async safety.

functions.name: generate_trace_id
functions.docstring: Generates a UUIDv4 trace ID.

classes.name: BaseRTIException
classes.docstring: Base exception class for RTI-Agent with structured metadata.

functions.name: format_exception_dict
functions.docstring: Formats an exception into a structured dictionary for logging.

functions.name: compress_state
functions.docstring:
Computes changed keys and a hash of the new state.
Prevents massive object graphs from blowing up log files.

classes.name: TelemetryJsonFormatter
classes.docstring: Custom JSON formatter with context propagation and PII redaction.

methods.name: format
methods.docstring: Applies PII redaction to the dict before serialization.

methods.name: process_log_record
methods.docstring: Hook into pythonjsonlogger to redact before JSON stringification.

functions.name: format
functions.docstring: Applies PII redaction to the dict before serialization.

functions.name: process_log_record
functions.docstring: Hook into pythonjsonlogger to redact before JSON stringification.

functions.name: estimate_cost
functions.docstring: Estimates USD cost based on token counts.

functions.name: track_llm_call
functions.docstring: Tracks metrics and logs the LLM call via the central telemetry facade.

classes.name: SamplingFilter
classes.docstring: Filters logs based on sampling rules.

functions.name: _create_handler
functions.docstring: Creates a file handler. Uses rotation on Linux, but flat files on Windows to avoid WinError 32 lock conflicts.

functions.name: get_logger
functions.docstring:
Returns a configured logger with standard handlers.
(This function exists for backward compatibility, but domain facades should be preferred).

functions.name: should_sample
functions.docstring: Determines if a log should be written.

functions.name: trace_node
functions.docstring:
Decorator for LangGraph nodes.
Logs entry, exit, execution time, and state changes (compressed).
Also sets node_id ContextVar so all log entries are correlated.
Also updates rti_agent_duration Prometheus histogram.

functions.name: redact_string
functions.docstring: Redacts PII from a single string.

functions.name: redact_dict
functions.docstring: Recursively redacts PII from dictionaries.

functions.name: redact_log_record
functions.docstring: Main entry point for log formatter PII scrubbing.

functions.name: log_provenance
functions.docstring:
Logs full RAG provenance for debugging hallucinations.
Only writes the metadata IDs/scores, not full text, to avoid massive logs.

functions.name: log_security_incident
functions.docstring:
Logs a security event to the dedicated security logger.
Automatically increments Prometheus counters.

classes.name: RTIJsonFormatter
classes.docstring: Custom JSON formatter adding service metadata to every log.

functions.name: get_logger
functions.docstring:
Returns a named logger with JSON formatting.
Uses a registry to avoid duplicate handlers.

methods.name: _emit
methods.docstring: Converts pydantic model to dict and pushes to logger.

functions.name: _emit
functions.docstring: Converts pydantic model to dict and pushes to logger.

functions.name: log_error
functions.docstring: Central method to log exceptions.

functions.name: trace_tool
functions.docstring: Decorator to automatically trace tool execution.

functions.name: setup_opentelemetry
functions.docstring:
Initializes OpenTelemetry TracerProvider, SpanProcessors, and Exporters.
To be activated when OTEL is deployed.

functions.name: get_tracer
functions.docstring: Returns a tracer instance.

functions.name: setup_tracing
functions.docstring:
Configure LangSmith tracing environment.
Call once at application startup.
